Uses of Class
net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.astar.Node

  • Packages that use Node 
    Package Description
    net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.astar  

    • Uses of Node in net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.astar

      Methods in net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.astar that return Node 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Node Path.get(int index)
      This method returns a specific node of the path.
      Node Areamap.get(int x, int y)
      Get the node at a specific location using two coordinates.
      Node Areamap.get(Vector point)
      Get the node at a specific location using a vector.
      Node SortedNodeList.getFirst()
      This method returns the first list entry.
      Node Node.getPreviousNode()
      This method returns the previous node.
      Methods in net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.astar that return types with arguments of type Node 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.ArrayList<Node> Node.getNeighborList()
      This method returns the list of neighbors.
      java.util.List<Node> Areamap.getNodes()
      Get a list of all nodes within the area map.
      java.util.ArrayList<Node> Path.getWaypoints()
      This method returns the waypoints.
      Methods in net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.astar with parameters of type Node 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void SortedNodeList.add(Node node)
      This method adds a node to the list.
      void Node.addNeighbor(Node node, Node.Direction direction)
      Adds the neighbor.
      void Path.appendWayPoint(Node n)
      Append a waypoint to the end of the path.
      int Node.compareTo(Node otherNode)
      This method compares two nodes.
      boolean SortedNodeList.contains(Node n)
      This method checks if a specific node is already in the list.
      boolean Node.equalsOtherNode(Node node)
      This method checks for equality with another node.
      static double AreamapHandler.minimumDistanceToObstacle(Node node, java.util.ArrayList<Node> obstacles)
      This function calculates the minimum distance to an obstacle.
      void Path.prependWayPoint(Node n)
      Add a waypoint to the beginning of the path.
      void SortedNodeList.remove(Node n)
      This method removes a specific node from the list.
      void Node.setPreviousNode(Node previousNode)
      This method sets the previous node.
      Method parameters in net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.astar with type arguments of type Node 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static double AreamapHandler.minimumDistanceToObstacle(Node node, java.util.ArrayList<Node> obstacles)
      This function calculates the minimum distance to an obstacle.
      void Path.setWaypoints(java.util.ArrayList<Node> waypoints)
      This method sets the waypoints.
